creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
patch via marcus@

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 357036)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@
 PIDGIN_SLAVE=  yes
 WITH_CONSOLEUI=        yes
 
+CPPFLAGS+=     -DNCURSES_WIDECHAR
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=        --disable-gtkui \
                --disable-nm \
